name: Bio-Mechanics Accord
desc:
Influences allies to pool bio-mechanical data and resources.
Increases mining storage by 6% for 20 hours, and refreshes your timer to grow Evolution Genes

name: Decree of Fecundity
desc: Generates 1 Evolution Gene for each planet you control that has influence (up to 25 Genes), and boosts Evolution Gene yields by 6% for 20 hours.

name: Special Session Directive
desc:
Influences the Galactic Council to meet for another special session.
Increases Influence capacity by 3% for 20 hours, and refreshes the timer for your 'Galactic Council'

name: Distributed Consensus
desc: Calls for unity and efficiency between factional and planetary leadership. Increases cargo storage by 11% for 20 hours, and triggers a random planetary event

name: Faceted Mandate
desc: Generates a 'Spectral Conglomerate' artifact when activated, and decreases ship upkeep by 11% for 30 hours
